internal_services.service_name: Appearance at the Office of the Sangguniang Panlungsod Hearings/ Sessions
internal_services.image: /assets/document_background/Appearance at the Office of the Sangguniang Panlungsod Hearings
internal_services.who_may_avail: Lipa City Mayor’s Office and other LGU offices

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Legal documents related to the matter to be heard before the Office of the Sangguniang Panlungsod
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Mayor’s Office and other government offices involved in the matter for consideration of the Office of the Sangguniang Panlungsod

steps.client_step: 1. Submit all relevant documents and other pieces of object evidence, as may be applicable, for consideration of the Office of the Sangguniang Panlungsod
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer (Lipa City Legal Office)

steps.agency_action: 1.4. Attend the hearing and engage in the deliberation
steps.person_responsible: Acting Assistant City Legal Officer / City Legal Officer (Lipa City Legal Office)

internal_services.service_name: Request for Drafting of Legal Document
internal_services.who_may_avail: City Mayor’s Office, Office of the Sangguniang Panlungsod

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Legal documents the client desires to incorporate in the legal instruments to be drafted – 1 original copy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Mayor’s Office or Office of the Sangguniang Panlungsod

steps.client_step: 1. Submit legal concerns/ issues and present relevant documents to be incorporated in the legal instruments, such as ordinances, contracts, bonds, leases to be drafted
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer V (Lipa City Legal Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit legal concerns/ issues and present relevant documents to be incorporated in the legal instruments, such as ordinances, contracts, bonds, leases to be drafted
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer / Acting Assistant City Legal Officer (Lipa City Legal Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit legal concerns/ issues and present relevant documents to be incorporated in the legal instruments, such as ordinances, contracts, bonds, leases to be drafted
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer / Acting Assistant City Legal Officer (Lipa City Legal Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit legal concerns/ issues and present relevant documents to be incorporated in the legal instruments, such as ordinances, contracts, bonds, leases to be drafted
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer / Acting Assistant City Legal Officer (Lipa City Legal Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit legal concerns/ issues and present relevant documents to be incorporated in the legal instruments, such as ordinances, contracts, bonds, leases to be drafted
steps.agency_action: 1.5. Review and approve the legal document drafted
steps.person_responsible: City Legal Officer (Lipa City Legal Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Acknowledge receipt
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV (Lipa City Legal Office)
